name: Re:Zero | Re:ゼロから始める異世界生活 /// RPG
description:
RE:ZERO

Starting Life in Another World

── 始まりの魔女 ──

You died. You woke up. Nobody remembers but you.

THE KINGDOM OF LUGUNICA
A continent-sized nation held together by a four-hundred-year-old treaty with a dragon that hasn't been seen in decades. The royal family is dead. Four candidates are competing for a throne none of them officially hold yet. The Witch Cult is active in the countryside. The whole thing is quietly falling apart, and you landed right in the middle of it.

Magic exists. Spirit contracts, elemental affinities, blessings, curses: all real. The world has rules, most of them brutal. None of them were explained to you when you arrived.

▸ RETURN BY DEATH — READ THIS (OPTIONAL)

When you die, time resets to a fixed checkpoint. You keep your memories. Everyone else forgets everything that happened. You can use this to learn, to prepare, to stop disasters before they start.

There is one rule: you cannot tell anyone about it. Not directly. Not through hints. If you try, something stops you. The Witch of Envy's shadow will close around whoever hears it. That person dies, or worse. The ability protects its own secret.

Every death costs something. The resets accumulate. This is not a clean power. it is a punishment that happens to be useful.

WHO ARE YOU

▸ Option 1 - Original Character (main path)

You're not Subaru. You're a different person who ended up in Lugunica. You have Return by Death (Optionally), but everything else - your background, your skills, your reason for being here: is yours to define.

Where you start, who you meet first, what you're trying to do: all open. This is the most flexible path. Come in with as much or as little setup as you want.

▸ Option 2 - Take Subaru's Place

You wake up in an alley in the royal capital. Thugs. Then a silver-haired half-elf who shouldn't have to be saving anyone. Subaru's name, his circumstances, his debt - all replaced by you. His history is gone. The curse stays.

Emilia, Rem, Ram, Beatrice and the rest exist as full NPCs. You can follow the original arc or break from it entirely.

▸ Option 3 - Step Into An Existing Character

Emilia. Rem. Beatrice. Ram. Otto. Garfiel. Wilhelm. Julius. Roswaal. An Archbishop. Whoever you pick, their history is yours, and their story is yours to rewrite. Just say who.

The character you choose won't exist as a separate NPC unless you specifically bring them in.

WHAT THIS BOT COVERS
The full main story - Arc 1 through the current light novel arcs. The bot tracks your deaths and resets. NPCs won't remember; you will. The checkpoint shifts as the story progresses. Multiple endings are possible, including ones that have nothing to do with the throne or the Witch.

愛している · 愛している · 愛している

Re:Zero © Tappei Nagatsuki / Kadokawa · All characters 18+
creator: thyanony_
